title: The Commander Battles Intensify
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Sanji, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, King, Beast Pirates as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: My dormant, augmented abilities were awakened...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: But it doesn't matter at this point!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not gonna lose any more of myself!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: GAH!! What a waste!! I wanted to see you Morph!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Farewell, women's baths!! I'll find my own way to end this fight!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Outside the dome - zero vs. King

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huh?! Where did this transponder snail come from?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I slipped it into your Haramaki just in case you got lost and wound up facing death in a corner somewhere...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What do you want, you dumb cook?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: We're going to beat the beast pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: "I want you to put me down!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is this thanks to Judge's experiments, Germa Brat?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop Stoking The Fire... I'm already white hot!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not sure I get it, but fine, if it comes to that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now I've got something to look forward to....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: You better not die before then!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: A strike that shows his resolve!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 43 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
